phrases.text_local: Por favor, onde posso embrulhar um presente?
phrases.pronunciation: POOR fuh-VOHR, OHNG-dih PAW-soo aymb-roo-LYAHR OONNG preh-ZAYNG-tih?

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get gift wrapping
phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese shops, gift wrapping is often a separate service counter.

likely_response.translation_en: You can ask the salesperson for help.

responses.english: You can ask the salesperson for help.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso provar produtos locais como queijo e azeite?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo proo-VAHR proo-DOO-toosh loo-KEYESH KOH-moo KAY-zhoo EH uh-ZAY-tih?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao vendedor sobre as provas de produtos.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vayng-dih-DOHR SOHB-rih UHSH PROH-vuhsh DIH proo-DOO-toosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the salesperson about product tastings.

responses.english: Ask the salesperson about product tastings.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vayng-dih-DOHR SOHB-rih UHSH PROH-vuhsh DIH proo-DOO-toosh.
responses.french: Pergunte ao vendedor sobre as provas de produtos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay for purchases
phrases.text_local: Onde posso efetuar o pagamento das compras?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ee-fih-TOOAHR AW puh-guh-MAYNG-too DUHSH KOHMP-ruhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Pagamentos em mercados tradicionais alentejanos costumam ter caixas centralizados para agilizar o atendimento.

likely_response.local: O pagamento é feito no caixa.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW puh-guh-MAYNG-too EH FAY-too NOO KEYE-shuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Payment is made at the cashier.

responses.english: Payment is made at the cashier.
responses.phonetic: AW puh-guh-MAYNG-too EH FAY-too NOO KEYE-shuh.
responses.french: O pagamento é feito no caixa.

phrases.cultural_note: Muitas bancas de artesanato em Évora operam apenas com dinheiro, mas existe um terminal centralizado.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao lojista ou ao empacotador se há serviço de embrulho.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW loo-ZHEESH-tuh OHW OW aym-puh-koo-tuh-DOHR SIH AH seh-ruh-VEE-soo DIH aymb-ROO-lyoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the shopkeeper or the packer if there is a wrapping service.

responses.english: Ask the shopkeeper or the packer if there is a wrapping service.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW loo-ZHEESH-tuh OHW OW aym-puh-koo-tuh-DOHR SIH AH seh-ruh-VEE-soo DIH aymb-ROO-lyoo.
responses.french: Pergunte ao lojista ou ao empacotador se há serviço de embrulho.

phrases.text_local: As barracas da Rua do Raimundo aceitam cartão de crédito?
phrases.pronunciation: UHSH buh-RAH-kuhsh DUH ROOUH DOO reye-MOONNG-doo uh-SAY-tuhng kuh-ruh-TOWN DIH KREH-dee-too?

likely_response.local: Algumas aceitam cartão, outras só dinheiro. Pergunte ao vendedor.
likely_response.pronunciation: ahl-GOO-muhsh uh-SAY-tuhng kuh-ruh-TOWN, OHWT-ruhsh SAW dee-NYAY-roo. peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vayng-dih-DOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Do the stalls on Rua do Raimundo accept credit cards? Some accept cards, others cash only. Ask the salesperson.

responses.english: Do the stalls on Rua do Raimundo accept credit cards? Some accept cards, others cash only. Ask the salesperson.
responses.phonetic: ahl-GOO-muhsh uh-SAY-tuhng kuh-ruh-TOWN, OHWT-ruhsh SAW dee-NYAY-roo. peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW vayng-dih-DOHR.
responses.french: Algumas aceitam cartão, outras só dinheiro. Pergunte ao vendedor.

phrases.text_local: Olá, onde posso provar os produtos?
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih PAW-soo proo-VAHR OOSH proo-DOO-toosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Tasting is common for local specialties like queijo de Évora and azeite alentejano. Approach the counter and ask politely.

likely_response.local: No balcão de degustação, à esquerda.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO bahl-KOWN DIH dih-goosh-tuh-SOWN, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: At the tasting counter, on the left.

responses.english: At the tasting counter, on the left.
responses.phonetic: NOO bahl-KOWN DIH dih-goosh-tuh-SOWN, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh.
responses.french: No balcão de degustação, à esquerda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay for purchases
phrases.cultural_note: A concentração dos pagamentos num único ponto facilita a gestão de fluxos em ruas comerciais estreitas.

likely_response.local: Pode pagar na caixa ou diretamente ao artesão, dependendo do que comprar.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih puh-GAHR NUH KEYE-shuh OHW dee-rih-tuh-MAYNG-tih OW uh-ruh-tih-ZOWN, dih-payng-DAYNG-doo DOO KIH koomp-RAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: You can pay at the cashier or directly to the artisan, depending on what you buy.

responses.english: You can pay at the cashier or directly to the artisan, depending on what you buy.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih puh-GAHR NUH KEYE-shuh OHW dee-rih-tuh-MAYNG-tih OW uh-ruh-tih-ZOWN, dih-payng-DAYNG-doo DOO KIH koomp-RAHR.
responses.french: Pode pagar na caixa ou diretamente ao artesão, dependendo do que comprar.
